relevance_spans.text: Because agents are non-deterministic, they take unpredictable paths.

Eventually an agent will master all the baseline tasks in a suite hitting a 100 pass rate This is known as eval saturation At this point the suite is only useful for regression testing and engineers must introduce harder scenarios to
